Three maintainers reviewed: jcollie (too invasive, consolidate into logFn), jparise (split the macos privacy bits, Zig side limited by missing source-location), mitchellh/lead (approach valid but not worth the diff/maintenance). Author defended approach competently re: _os_log_impl inlining — so not incompetent, just AI-authored code of marginal value the human couldn't fully own. Richest specimen of the comprehension-gap pattern.
